output: Wrote candidate `gen-2605-2-000-3eccf591.md` — a four-turn SRE-rollout scenario targeting `redundant_tool_invocation` via the stale-distrust + verification-spam sub-surfaces. The file is read once in Turn 1; Turns 2-4 all have answers visible in the prior tool result, with progressively softer social pressure to re-read despite no evidence of change. Discrimination point: strong models issue ≤1 `read_file` total; weaker models cave to "double-check"/"just to be safe" framing and re-call 2-3×.
